{"query":"INSERT INTO produktionsAnlagenConfig (intTp_ID,unt_ID, mst_ID,prd_id,anl_id,anl_col,startDate,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,note,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,mstIMw) VALUES ('1', '1', '30', '' , '' , '' , '2021-02-01', '2021-02-06', '','', '0', 'Diesel-Gesamt-V Notiz','2' , '2','Diesel-Gesamt-V') "}
